reviews.comment:
Pésimo.  Antes de cargar pregunto si tienen la app YPF. Me dicen que si pero al pagar resulta que no tienen señal o no se que cuento. Aparte muy pocas ganas de trabajar el que me atendió. Colocó la manguera y se fue por un gasto largo.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible. Before filling up, I asked if they had the YPF app. They said yes, but when I went to pay, it turned out they had no signal or something. Besides, the guy who helped me seemed very unmotivated. He connected the nozzle and left, having spent a lot of time on the gas.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJeDRfeFBnEAE

reviews.comment:
La peor atencion de los playeros,  lentos,  sin ganas, boludean,  pierden el tiempo, la estación de servicios más lenta del mundo.

(Translated by Google)
The worst service from the attendants, slow, unmotivated, goofing off, wasting time, the slowest service station in the world.
